name: stumason
description: Stu Mason's agent skills as an installable Claude Code plugin. Six skills, one per scar.

plugins.name: stumason-skills
plugins.description: stop-patching, ticket-readiness, verify-bug-reports, brag-nudge, prose-revision, answer-first: refuse the duct tape, send vague tickets back, check bug reports before fixing, brag about shipping, cut the waffle, lead with the answer.
